tasks.title: HVAC spring tune-up
tasks.description: Schedule professional AC inspection before summer heat. Check refrigerant, clean coils, replace filter.

tasks.title: Irrigation system startup
tasks.description: Turn on irrigation, check for broken heads, adjust zones for spring growth.

tasks.title: Foundation watering check
tasks.description: North Texas clay soil shrinks in heat. Verify soaker hoses around foundation are working. Maintain consistent moisture.

tasks.title: Gutter cleaning (post-storm)
tasks.description: Clear gutters and downspouts after spring storms. Check for hail damage.

tasks.title: Lawn fertilization (spring)
tasks.description: Apply pre-emergent and fertilizer for Bermuda/St. Augustine. North Texas lawns need early spring feeding.

tasks.title: Smoke detector battery test
tasks.description: Test all smoke and CO detectors. Replace batteries if needed.

tasks.title: Check for hail damage
tasks.description: After spring storm season, inspect roof, siding, windows, and fencing for hail damage. Document for insurance.

tasks.title: HVAC filter change
tasks.description: Replace HVAC filter monthly during peak summer. Texas heat means AC runs constantly.

tasks.title: Foundation watering (summer)
tasks.description: Water foundation 3-4 times per week during 100°F+ heat. Clay soil cracks cause foundation movement.

tasks.title: Irrigation audit
tasks.description: Check irrigation coverage, fix broken heads, adjust schedules for water restrictions.

tasks.title: Attic insulation check
tasks.description: Verify attic insulation is intact. North Texas attics can reach 150°F.

tasks.title: Exterior paint/caulk inspection
tasks.description: Check for peeling paint, cracked caulk around windows and doors.

tasks.title: HVAC fall tune-up (heating)
tasks.description: Schedule furnace inspection before winter. Test heating, check gas connections.

tasks.title: Gutter cleaning (fall leaves)
tasks.description: Clear gutters of fallen leaves before winter rains.

tasks.title: Irrigation winterization
tasks.description: Blow out irrigation lines before first freeze. Insulate backflow preventer.

tasks.title: Lawn winter prep
tasks.description: Apply winterizer fertilizer. Last mow at slightly lower height.

tasks.title: Weather stripping check
tasks.description: Check weather stripping on all exterior doors. Replace if worn.

tasks.title: Fireplace/chimney inspection
tasks.description: If applicable, have chimney inspected and cleaned before first use.

tasks.title: Freeze preparation
tasks.description: Insulate exposed pipes, disconnect garden hoses, cover outdoor faucets. Know water shutoff location.

tasks.title: HVAC filter change
tasks.description: Replace HVAC filter. Heating system runs more in cold months.

tasks.title: Water heater flush
tasks.description: Drain and flush water heater to remove sediment buildup.

tasks.title: Garage door maintenance
tasks.description: Lubricate garage door tracks, test auto-reverse safety feature.

tasks.title: Check for ice dam risk
tasks.description: After rare North Texas ice storms, check for ice buildup on roof edges and gutters.
